params.name: key
params.description: Key of the workflow to trigger.

items.docs: Trigger a workflow (specified by the key) to run for the given recipients, using the parameters provided. Returns an identifier for the workflow run request. All workflow runs are executed asynchronously. This endpoint also handles [inline identifications](/managing-recipients/identifying-recipients#inline-identifying-recipients) for the `actor`, `recipient`, and `tenant` fields.

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the workflow to cancel.

items.docs: When invoked for a workflow using a specific workflow key and cancellation key, will cancel any queued workflow runs associated with that key/cancellation key pair. Can optionally be provided one or more recipients to scope the request to.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier for the workflow recipient run (per-recipient).

items.docs: Returns a single workflow recipient run with its associated events.

params.name: after
params.description: The cursor to fetch entries after.

params.name: before
params.description: The cursor to fetch entries before.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of items per page (defaults to 50).

params.name: workflow
params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs for the given workflow key.

params.name: status[]
params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs with the given status.

params.name: tenant
params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs for the given tenant.

params.name: has_errors
params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs that have errors.

params.name: recipient
params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs for the given recipient. Accepts a user ID string or an object reference with `id` and `collection`.

params.name: starting_at
params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs started after the given date.

params.name: ending_at
params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs started before the given date.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of workflow recipient runs for the current environment.
